scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:root
scripts.test:packages: pnpm --filter @starter/adapters-cloudflare-queue test && pnpm --filter @starter/adapters-d1 test && pnpm --filter @starter/contracts test && pnpm --filter @starter/security test && pnpm --filter @starter/core test && pnpm --filter @starter/throttle test && pnpm --filter @starter/demo-connector test
